bio: Asadollah Badfar served as the head of the [Basij Forces](/orgs/basij), the paramilitary volunteer militia under the [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps). He was killed in an Israeli airstrike in early March 2026, with his funeral reported around 9 March 2026 as part of the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave).

sources.title: Funeral Held for Basij Commander Badfar

editorial_notes: Killed c. 9 March 2026 (funeral date). Head of Basij Forces.
